name: Jira
description: Atlassian's project tracking tool for agile teams. Scrum/Kanban boards, sprints, backlogs, and deep integration with developer tools.

name: Asana
description: Work management platform for teams. Tasks, timelines, boards, portfolios, and workflow automation.

name: Linear
description: Fast, keyboard-driven issue tracker built for software teams. Cycles, roadmaps, and GitHub/GitLab integration.

name: Trello
description: Visual project management with Kanban boards, lists, and cards. Simple drag-and-drop interface with Power-Up integrations.

name: Monday.com
description: Work OS with customizable boards, automations, and dashboards. Supports project management, CRM, and dev workflows.

name: ClickUp
description: All-in-one productivity platform. Tasks, docs, goals, whiteboards, and time tracking in a single workspace.

name: Shortcut
description: Project management for software teams, formerly Clubhouse. Stories, epics, iterations, and a clean API-first design.

name: Basecamp
description: Project management and team communication tool. To-dos, message boards, schedules, and file sharing without feature overload.

name: Plane
description: Open-source project management tool. Issues, cycles, modules, and views with self-hosted or cloud deployment.

name: Taiga
description: Open-source project management for agile teams. Scrum and Kanban boards, epics, user stories, and a clean, intuitive interface.

name: Salesforce
description: The leading CRM platform. Sales, service, marketing, and analytics clouds with an extensive AppExchange ecosystem.

name: HubSpot
description: CRM platform with free tier covering sales, marketing, service, and CMS hubs. Inbound marketing pioneer.

name: Pipedrive
description: Sales-focused CRM with visual pipeline management. Deal tracking, activity reminders, and sales reporting.

name: Zoho CRM
description: CRM with sales automation, analytics, and multichannel communication. Part of the larger Zoho suite of 45+ apps.

name: Freshsales
description: AI-powered CRM by Freshworks. Lead scoring, built-in phone and email, deal pipelines, and workflow automation.

name: Attio
description: Modern CRM that syncs with email and calendar. Flexible data modeling, real-time collaboration, and relationship intelligence.

name: Close
description: CRM built for inside sales teams. Built-in calling, SMS, email sequences, and pipeline reporting in one tool.

name: Twenty
description: Open-source CRM alternative to Salesforce. Modern UI, customizable objects, and full API access. Self-hosted or cloud.

name: Folk
description: Lightweight CRM for relationship management. Imports contacts from email, LinkedIn, and other sources with pipeline views.

name: QuickBooks
description: Intuit's accounting software for small and mid-sized businesses. Invoicing, expense tracking, payroll, and tax prep.

name: GnuCash
description: Free, open-source double-entry accounting software for personal and small business use. Tracks stocks, income, and expenses.

name: FreshBooks
description: Cloud accounting for freelancers and small businesses. Time tracking, invoicing, expense management, and project profitability.

name: Xero
description: Cloud-based accounting for small businesses. Bank reconciliation, invoicing, inventory, and a marketplace of 1000+ integrations.

name: Wave
description: Free accounting and invoicing software for small businesses and freelancers. Income/expense tracking and financial reporting.

name: Ledger
description: Command-line double-entry accounting tool. Plain text bookkeeping with powerful querying, reporting, and scripting support.

name: hledger
description: Plain-text accounting tool inspired by Ledger. Cross-platform with web UI, CSV import, and multi-currency support.

name: Akaunting
description: Free, open-source online accounting software for small businesses. Invoicing, expenses, reports, and a module marketplace.

name: Sage
description: Cloud accounting and business management for small to mid-sized companies. Invoicing, payroll, payments, and compliance.

name: BambooHR
description: HR platform for small and medium businesses. Employee records, time-off tracking, onboarding, and performance management.

name: Gusto
description: Payroll, benefits, and HR platform for small businesses. Automated tax filing, health insurance, and compliance tools.

name: Rippling
description: Unified workforce platform combining HR, IT, and finance. Payroll, device management, app provisioning, and benefits.

name: Deel
description: Global payroll and compliance platform for hiring international contractors and employees. 150+ countries supported.

name: Remote.com
description: Global HR platform for hiring, payroll, and compliance in 60+ countries. Employer of record and contractor management.

name: Personio
description: All-in-one HR software for small and mid-sized European companies. Recruiting, onboarding, payroll, and absence management.

name: HiBob
description: Modern HR platform for mid-sized companies. People analytics, time tracking, compensation management, and culture tools.

name: Workday
description: Enterprise cloud platform for HR, finance, and planning. Workforce management, talent acquisition, and payroll at scale.

name: Lattice
description: People management platform for performance reviews, goals, engagement surveys, and career development tracking.

name: Greenhouse
description: Recruiting and onboarding platform. Structured hiring workflows, interview scorecards, and diversity analytics.

name: Lever
description: Applicant tracking and CRM system for talent acquisition. Pipeline management, nurture campaigns, and analytics.

name: Culture Amp
description: Employee experience platform with engagement surveys, performance management, and people analytics dashboards.

name: 15Five
description: Performance management platform with weekly check-ins, OKR tracking, 1-on-1 agendas, and engagement surveys.

name: Namely
description: Mid-market HR platform combining payroll, benefits administration, talent management, and compliance in one system.
